scope: zero-training localization of E1 failure between high-mask clean-element estimation and irreversible on-policy error propagation

decision_rule.representation_limited: all-MASK clean-element estimation is weak but multistep sampling does not materially worsen it; revise the joint composition/assignment representation before another E1 train run
decision_rule.irreversible_exposure: one-shot or oracle-revealed carriers materially outperform the on-policy absorbing trajectory; replace the irreversible approximate reverse path with a self-correcting categorical path before another E1 train run
decision_rule.mixed: both the all-MASK estimator and irreversible error propagation are material; test one structured self-correcting categorical mechanism that also represents graph-level composition, without target composition input
decision_rule.neither: the preregistered localization is inconclusive; audit metric implementation and the element head/data contract without adding training
decision_rule.boundary: This diagnostic performs zero optimizer steps and cannot authorize L1/M1/J2, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
